message:
fix: add event log writing, per-turn metadata, and compact routing to SessionController

Addresses spec compliance gaps:
- Events written to JSONL log file via bus.onEvent subscription
- Metadata updated on plan_end events via metadata.updateTurn()
- Compact command routing added to handleCommand switch
- Unhandled promise rejection fixed in submit_goal command handler

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
